<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep this PR focused on a single concern.
Use a Conventional Commits title, e.g. "feat(reports): add SARIF export".
-->

## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Related Issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore / other

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows the naming convention (`feature/`, `bugfix/`, `hotfix/`, ...)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] `pixi run ci` passes locally
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or usage changed
